---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving F2K
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: 'type: enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Is there an existing workaround?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution to the problem.

## Alternatives
Have you considered any alternative implementations or features?

## Use Case
Describe the user workflow that would benefit from this feature.

## Examples
If applicable, provide examples of similar implementations in other projects.

## Acceptance Criteria
How would we know this feature is complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (high user impact, high frequency)
- [ ] High (significant user benefit)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)
